title: Jag (disambiguation)
content:
'''Jag''' may refer to the following items:

==[[Canon]]==
*[[Jag]], a [[clone trooper pilot]].
*'''[[Jag Crag Gorge]]''', a location on the [[planet]] [[Tatooine]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Jagged Antilles]]''', [[Parent/Legends|grandfather]] of Jagged Fel.
*[[Jagged Fel|'''Jagged "Jag" Fel''']], [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and [[Head of State (Imperial Remnant)|Head of State]] of the [[Imperial Remnant]].
*[[Jai'galaar (clone)|Jai'galaar]], a [[Clone trooper pilot/Legends|clone trooper pilot]] also known as '''Jag'''.
*'''[[Jag Murrock]]''', [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]]
*[[Jag Crag Gorge/Legends|'''Jag Crag Gorge''']], a location on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

{{Disambig}}

|de=Jag
}}
